zh.Butley, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain William Forth於1435年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈德利時，他的父親Robert Forth26歲，母親Francis Margaret Glemham23歲。他於大約1460年與Francis Margaret Glemham在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈德利結婚。他去世於1504年8月在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain William Forth于1435年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可哈德利时，他的父亲Robert Forth26岁，母亲Francis Margaret Glemham23岁。他于大约1460年与Francis Margaret Glemham在英国英格兰素福爾可哈德利结婚。他去世于1504年8月在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可哈德利。

nameMeanings.name: Forth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Ford
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Fortmann
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt ‘ford’. See Forth .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain William Forth was born in 1435, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Forth, was 26 and his mother, Francis Margaret Glemham, was 23. He married Francis Margaret Glemham about 1460, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died in August 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain William Forth est né en 1435, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Forth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Francis Margaret Glemham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Francis Margaret Glemham environ 1460, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en août 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain William Forth 1435 in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Forth 26 und seine Mutter Francis Margaret Glemham 23. Er hat um 1460 in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Francis Margaret Glemham geheiratet. Er starb im August 1504 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain William Forth è nato il nel 1435 nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Forth, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Francis Margaret Glemham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Francis Margaret Glemham circa 1460, nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel agosto 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain William Forthが1435年にイギリスイギリススフォルクハドレイグで生まれた時，父Robert Forthは26歳，母Francis Margaret Glemhamは23歳であった。約1460年にイギリスイギリススフォルクハドレイグでFrancis Margaret Glemhamと結婚した。彼は1504年8月に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクハドレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Captain William Forth(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Forth(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Francis Margaret Glemham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하들리에서 Francis Margaret Glemham(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1504년 8월 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain William Forth nasceu em 1435, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Forth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Francis Margaret Glemham, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Francis Margaret Glemham aproximadamente 1460, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain William Forth родился в 1435 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Forth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Francis Margaret Glemham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Francis Margaret Glemham около 1460 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер август 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain William Forth nació en 1435, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Forth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Francis Margaret Glemham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Francis Margaret Glemham aproximadamente 1460, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en agosto de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
